task.summary: Removed required Numpy version - Will match with PySCF
Fixed bug - Read QTAIM wfx + Added exclude in ring finding
Fixed bug - Read QTAIM wfx + Added exclude in ring finding
IAO-AUTOSAD - Updated minimal basis size for all atoms
Merged + Added algorithm 5 - Shortest odd distance (if none, even)
Updated algorithm 4 - Separate by contributions with minimum odd distance (if none, even)
Updated algorithm 4 - Separate by contributions with minimum odd distance (if none, even)

MESSAGE.value: READFCHK - Improved MCI + FCHK works + Needs refinement
READFCHK - Improved MCI + FCHK works + Final tests needed
Removed required Numpy version - Will match with PySCF
Fixed bug - Read QTAIM wfx + Added exclude in ring finding
IAO-AUTOSAD - Updated minimal basis size for all atoms
Merged + Added algorithm 5 - Shortest odd distance (if none, even)
Updated algorithm 4 - Separate by contributions with minimum odd distance (if none, even)
